name: LIC Axis Bank Signature Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under LIC Axis Bank Signature Credit Card terms
additionalBenefits: Nil joining fee and nil annual fee
100% cashback up to Rs 300 on first utility bill payment within first 30 days of card issuance
2 Reward Points per Rs 100 on LIC premium payments and foreign currency transactions
1 Reward Point per Rs 100 on other eligible transactions
8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per calendar year at select domestic airports
Complimentary lost card liability insurance cover up to credit limit
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel purchases from Rs 400 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 400 per month
Dining Delights discounts at participating restaurants
Convert purchases of Rs 1,500 or more into EMI
Wednesday Delight offers as per Axis Bank programme terms

salaried: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India
